prompt_template:
use the following URL for all logo URLs: https://www.astound.com/wp-content/themes/astound/images/logos/logo-astound-vertical.png and Use the provided markdown below and generate schema for each and every URL, by first identify any rich results and schema.org types applicable to the content and generate a complete and valid JSON-LD schema markup for me to insert into the webpage and help with search indexing, and adding as much context to the content as possible. Be sure to include FAQ schema, special offers, and pre-fill as much as possible from the markdown file but if any placeholders are inserted then call that out in the response under the code. Do not use product schema markup without adding aggregate and individual reviews for the product and if relevant to the page. Analyze the following webpage content below and generate comprehensive, advanced JSON-LD structured data (Schema.org markup) for it. Include all relevant schema types, properties, and nested entities. Output ONLY valid JSON-LD wrapped in <script type="application/ld+json"> tags.

Webpage Content:
[PAGE_MARKDOWN]


Use the provided URL or an attached markdown file of a webpage to identify any rich results and schema.org types applicable to the content and generate a complete and valid JSON-LD schema markup for me to insert into the webpage and help with search indexing, and adding as much context to the content as possible. Be sure to include FAQ schema, special offers, and pre-fill as much as possible from the markdown file but if any placeholders are inserted then call that out in the response under the code.
url_prompt_template:
You will be given a webpage URL. Analyze the page content and generate comprehensive, advanced JSON-LD structured data (Schema.org markup) for the page. Identify all applicable rich results and schema.org types. Include FAQ schema, special offers, and aggregate reviews where relevant. Output ONLY valid JSON-LD wrapped in <script type="application/ld+json"> tags, followed by a brief note of any placeholders used.

Page URL: [PAGE_URL]
